name: Gabby Douglas
title: Olympic Gymnast
bio: American artistic gymnast who became the first African American to win the individual all-around gold medal at the 2012 Olympics. Also won team gold in 2012 and 2016.
faith: A devout Christian who has openly credited God for her success. She wrote 'Grace, Gold, and Glory: My Leap of Faith,' sharing how her faith sustained her through challenges. She has said, 'My faith is everything to me.'

sources.title: Gabby Douglas — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Olympic champion gymnast

sources.title: Grace, Gold, and Glory: My Leap of Faith
sources.note: By Gabrielle Douglas. Her autobiography about faith and gymnastics

tagline: Won Olympic gold and gave all the glory to God
